positive: A complex, symmetrical neo-geometric mandala design depicting deep space mythology. The central motif is a stylized, bioluminescent celestial beast coiled around a crescent moon and orbiting planets. Elements include stylized constellations (Orion, Pleiades), crystalline nebulas, and flowing cosmic silk ribbons. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, forming a strong, easily recognizable silhouette when placed on fabric. Use a high-contrast, limited color palette of deep indigo, iridescent gold, electric teal, and pure white highlights. Style should be a mix of elegant Alphonse Mucha poster art meets ethereal Art Deco geometry, favoring clean lines, sharp edges, and dramatic radial symmetry. Flat graphic design style with deep dimensional shading, highly detailed and ready for screen printing or embroidery.
